ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state to which the city belongs */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the city */,
  "area_sq_km" TEXT /* Area of the city in square kilometers */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Last time the city data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "precincts" (
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each precinct */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city where the precinct is located */,
  "precinct_name" TEXT /* Name of the precinct */,
  "ward_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ward to which the precinct belongs */,
  "voter_turnout_2022" TEXT /* Voter turnout for the 2022 election */,
  "voter_turnout_2023" TEXT /* Voter turnout for the 2023 election */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Last time the precinct data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("precinct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_precincts_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tracts" (
  "tract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tract */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city where the tract is located */,
  "tract_name" TEXT /* Name of the tract */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county to which the tract belongs */,
  "median_income" TEXT /* Median income of the tract */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Last time the tract data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracts_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election result */,
  "tract_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tract where the election was held */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the precinct where the election was held */,
  "democrat_votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes for the Democratic candidate */,
  "republican_votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes for the Republican candidate */,
  "total_votes" INTEGER /* Total number of votes cast */,
  "election_date_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the date of the election */,
  "election_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of the election */,
  "voter_turnout" TEXT /* Voter turnout for the election */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Last time the election result data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_election_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_type_id") REFERENCES election_types ("election_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_id") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_tract_id FOREIGN KEY ("tract_id") REFERENCES tracts ("tract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_election_date_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_date_id") REFERENCES election_dates ("election_date_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "tract_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tract where the demographic data is applicable */,
  "population_estimate" INTEGER /* Estimated total population */,
  "mexican_population" INTEGER /* Estimated Mexican population */,
  "puerto_rican_population" INTEGER /* Estimated Puerto Rican population */,
  "cuban_population" INTEGER /* Estimated Cuban population */,
  "other_hispanic_population" INTEGER /* Estimated Other Hispanic or Latino population */,
  "median_age" TEXT /* Median age of the population */,
  "median_household_income" TEXT /* Median household income */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Last time the demographic data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_tract_id FOREIGN KEY ("tract_id") REFERENCES tracts ("tract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Name of the candidate */,
  "party" TEXT /* Party affiliation of the candidate */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the candidate */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the candidate */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Last time the candidate data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidate_votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote entry */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election result */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the candidate */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes for the candidate */,
  "voter_turnout" TEXT /* Voter turnout for the candidate */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Last time the candidate vote data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidate_votes_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidate_votes_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES election_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_dates" (
  "election_date_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election date */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date of the election */,
  "election_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of the election */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Last time the election date data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_date_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_dates_election_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_type_id") REFERENCES election_types ("election_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_types" (
  "election_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election type */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of election (e.g., primary, general) */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Last time the election type data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Last time the user data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Last time the access log data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_officials" (
  "official_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election official */,
  "official_name" TEXT /* Full name of the official */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the official */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the official (e.g., administrator, coordinator) */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Last time the election official data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("official_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_commission" (
  "commission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the election commission */,
  "commission_name" TEXT /* Name of the commission */,
  "chairperson" TEXT /* Name of the chairperson */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the commission */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Last time the election commission data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_rules" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election rule */,
  "rule_text" TEXT /* Text of the election rule */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the rule became effective */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Last time the election rule data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id")
)
